name: deep-dive
description: Structured research, option exploration, and implementation planning workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Research complex work, explore options, and write implementation plans.
interface.longDescription: A structured Codex workflow for complex software tasks: gather facts without proposing solutions, explore multiple approaches and trade-offs, then produce a concrete implementation plan after direction is clear.
defaultPrompt: Deep research this refactor before we decide on an approach.
Explore implementation options using the existing research notes.
Turn the deep-dive artifacts into an implementation plan.
